headline: Synopsys Announces Earnings Release Date for Second Quarter Fiscal Year 2026
summary: Synopsys, Inc. (Nasdaq: SNPS) today announced it will report results for the second quarter fiscal year 2026 on Wednesday, May 27, 2026, after market close. The company will host a conference call at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time / 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time to review its financial results and business outlook.

headline: Why Is Atomera Stock Gaining Monday?
summary: Atomera (ATOM) jumps as it expands its GaN device modeling partnership with Synopsys to boost RF and power chip performance.
